texts.label: text
texts.orig: Thank you for choosing Maanzoni Lodge ('the hotel') to be your accommodation partner.
texts.text: Thank you for choosing Maanzoni Lodge ('the hotel') to be your accommodation partner.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ▪ 10am and 4pm tea or coffee with snacks
texts.text: 10am and 4pm tea or coffee with snacks

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ▪ Complimentary access to Maanzoni nature trail
texts.text: Complimentary access to Maanzoni nature trail

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -All rooms are ensuite and have complimentary in-room tea/coffee making facilities, bottled water Wi-Fi , 42' televisions with several satellite channels,
texts.text: -All rooms are ensuite and have complimentary in-room tea/coffee making facilities, bottled water Wi-Fi , 42' televisions with several satellite channels,

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Billed as per the client requests.
texts.text: Billed as per the client requests.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations must be entered into in writing (letter/fax/email/booking voucher/ LPO).
texts.text: All reservations must be entered into in writing (letter/fax/email/booking voucher/ LPO).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Weekend rate applies on Friday, Saturday and Sunday nights only. Not applicable to block booked rooms.
texts.text: The Weekend rate applies on Friday, Saturday and Sunday nights only. Not applicable to block booked rooms.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations can be made by phone however this must be followed with an LPO, voucher or official letterhead with the authorizing signature. Except for manifest fraud, all documents appearing to have been signed by an authorized signatory shall bind the Tour Operator unless otherwise advised to the hotel and will take effect from the time of notification.
texts.text: Reservations can be made by phone however this must be followed with an LPO, voucher or official letterhead with the authorizing signature. Except for manifest fraud, all documents appearing to have been signed by an authorized signatory shall bind the Tour Operator unless otherwise advised to the hotel and will take effect from the time of notification.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations by the Tour Operator with detailed rooming list should be received by the hotel's Reservations Office prior to guest's arrival.
texts.text: All reservations by the Tour Operator with detailed rooming list should be received by the hotel's Reservations Office prior to guest's arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Confirmation of accommodation by the hotel will be made to you in writing giving a confirmation number and details of the confirmation. The hotel reserves the right not to honour bookings not confirmed in this format.
texts.text: Confirmation of accommodation by the hotel will be made to you in writing giving a confirmation number and details of the confirmation. The hotel reserves the right not to honour bookings not confirmed in this format.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event that the details of the confirmation letter are incorrect, please amend the errors in writing and inform the hotel as soon as possible. The hotel will not be held liable if these errors are not amended in writing at least 72-hours prior to arrival.
texts.text: In the event that the details of the confirmation letter are incorrect, please amend the errors in writing and inform the hotel as soon as possible. The hotel will not be held liable if these errors are not amended in writing at least 72-hours prior to arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations can be made directly to the hotel:
texts.text: Reservations can be made directly to the hotel:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any additional request over and above the original confirmed bookings is to be arranged with an official email or voucher to the hotel's reservations department.
texts.text: Any additional request over and above the original confirmed bookings is to be arranged with an official email or voucher to the hotel's reservations department.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rate includes buffet breakfast in main restaurant Lunch USD20, Dinner at USD25. Meals are buffet-style or a la carte served in the main restaurant. Takeaway meal boxes available. Room service will incur a tray charge.
texts.text: Rate includes buffet breakfast in main restaurant Lunch USD20, Dinner at USD25. Meals are buffet-style or a la carte served in the main restaurant. Takeaway meal boxes available. Room service will incur a tray charge.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Check out time on the day of departure is 10.00hrs.
texts.text: Check out time on the day of departure is 10.00hrs.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Early arrivals require pre-booking to guarantee rooms on arrival and this is subject to availability.
texts.text: Early arrivals require pre-booking to guarantee rooms on arrival and this is subject to availability.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of cancellation or reduction in rooms booked or reduction in room nights:
texts.text: In the event of cancellation or reduction in rooms booked or reduction in room nights:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 15-days prior up to day of arrival & NoShow
texts.text: 15-days prior up to day of arrival & NoShow

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Day Room rate is at seventy five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate. Check out time for day use is 18:00hrs. Check-out after 18:00hrs is subject to the full room rate.
texts.text: The Day Room rate is at seventy five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate. Check out time for day use is 18:00hrs. Check-out after 18:00hrs is subject to the full room rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel will consider allotments on special request by the Operator. Updates on allotment status would be required advising the number of rooms sold at 90 days, 60 days and 30 days.
texts.text: The hotel will consider allotments on special request by the Operator. Updates on allotment status would be required advising the number of rooms sold at 90 days, 60 days and 30 days.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A group is considered as 10 or more rooms on the peak night.
texts.text: A group is considered as 10 or more rooms on the peak night.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: HOTEL BANK DETAILS - Kenya Shillings Account
texts.text: HOTEL BANK DETAILS - Kenya Shillings Account

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Unless the Operator has approved credit facilities with Maanzoni Lodge, the guest is required to make full payment prior to guest's arrival.
texts.text: Unless the Operator has approved credit facilities with Maanzoni Lodge, the guest is required to make full payment prior to guest's arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For credit application forms, contact the Accounts department. Credit facilities take a minimum of 30-days for processing.
texts.text: For credit application forms, contact the Accounts department. Credit facilities take a minimum of 30-days for processing.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cheque payments will be accepted 7-days prior to the guest arrival date. Should payment not be cleared by the bank before guest arrival, the hotel reserves the right to request cash payment before the guest(s) check(s) in.
texts.text: Cheque payments will be accepted 7-days prior to the guest arrival date. Should payment not be cleared by the bank before guest arrival, the hotel reserves the right to request cash payment before the guest(s) check(s) in.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Payment default shall constituter cause for credit termination. The Operator shall be considered to be in a condition of payment default if invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days. Without prejudice to other rights available to the hotel, under the law, should a cheque issued by the Operator be returned unpaid, the Operator shall replace the cheque within 48-hour with by certified funds or cash and include returned cheque fees of 5% of the cheque amount.
texts.text: Payment default shall constituter cause for credit termination. The Operator shall be considered to be in a condition of payment default if invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days. Without prejudice to other rights available to the hotel, under the law, should a cheque issued by the Operator be returned unpaid, the Operator shall replace the cheque within 48-hour with by certified funds or cash and include returned cheque fees of 5% of the cheque amount.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Failure to replace a returned cheque(s) shall constitute default and the hotel reserves the right to engage a debt collector and or to pursue legal recourse.
texts.text: Failure to replace a returned cheque(s) shall constitute default and the hotel reserves the right to engage a debt collector and or to pursue legal recourse.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Operator agrees to pay any and all expenses incurred by the hotel in the collection of unpaid invoices and/or returned cheques.
texts.text: The Operator agrees to pay any and all expenses incurred by the hotel in the collection of unpaid invoices and/or returned cheques.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For companies without approved credit facilities, the following deposit policy applies:
texts.text: For companies without approved credit facilities, the following deposit policy applies:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Deposits are non-refundable for groups and 1 night charge for individual bookings.
texts.text: Deposits are non-refundable for groups and 1 night charge for individual bookings.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All incidental charges are payable by cash or by credit card upon checking-out. Operators should advise their guest's on the credit cards facilities available at the hotel. For tour groups, it is the responsibility of the Tour Director/Guide to ensure that all incidental charges are settled or collected Prior to departure. Charges not collected will be deemed the responsibility of the Operator.
texts.text: All incidental charges are payable by cash or by credit card upon checking-out. Operators should advise their guest's on the credit cards facilities available at the hotel. For tour groups, it is the responsibility of the Tour Director/Guide to ensure that all incidental charges are settled or collected Prior to departure. Charges not collected will be deemed the responsibility of the Operator.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A maximum of two adults are permitted per room.
texts.text: A maximum of two adults are permitted per room.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Children under 3 years sharing a room with an Adult stay free of charge. Children aged over 3-years and below 12years sharing own room pay 75% of the
texts.text: Children under 3 years sharing a room with an Adult stay free of charge. Children aged over 3-years and below 12years sharing own room pay 75% of the

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Two (2) children above 12-years of age staying in their own room shall pay the full amount of a double adult rate. With the exception of the Suites, an extra bed cannot be provided.
texts.text: Two (2) children above 12-years of age staying in their own room shall pay the full amount of a double adult rate. With the exception of the Suites, an extra bed cannot be provided.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For payments made in any other currency apart from US Dollar (US), the applicable Hotel exchange rate of the day will apply.
texts.text: For payments made in any other currency apart from US Dollar (US), the applicable Hotel exchange rate of the day will apply.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: These rates do not apply for meetings, incentives and events groups.  Rates will be determined on a case by case basis
texts.text: These rates do not apply for meetings, incentives and events groups.  Rates will be determined on a case by case basis

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel has a responsibility to ensure the descriptions of the property and services are accurately depicted. All descriptive and Advertising copies should be submitted to the hotel for approval prior to publication.
texts.text: The hotel has a responsibility to ensure the descriptions of the property and services are accurately depicted. All descriptive and Advertising copies should be submitted to the hotel for approval prior to publication.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Maanzoni Lodges finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date, failure to which the Operator will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered and the Operator notified o f the hotel's determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted on the invoice and payment will be due within seven (7) days of the adjusted invoice.  It is expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, action or other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.
texts.text: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Maanzoni Lodges finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date, failure to which the Operator will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered and the Operator notified o f the hotel's determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted on the invoice and payment will be due within seven (7) days of the adjusted invoice.  It is expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, action or other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Operator confirms and agrees that this agreement is confidential to both parties herein. The operator shall not under any circumstances divulge or permit to be divulged this agreement or its comments to any other person or entity.
texts.text: The Operator confirms and agrees that this agreement is confidential to both parties herein. The operator shall not under any circumstances divulge or permit to be divulged this agreement or its comments to any other person or entity.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All parties shall not be held responsible in the event, and to the extent, the performance of this agreement is delayed or prevented by any cause beyond its control, including 'Acts of God' and circumstances not due to its fault or negligence.
texts.text: All parties shall not be held responsible in the event, and to the extent, the performance of this agreement is delayed or prevented by any cause beyond its control, including 'Acts of God' and circumstances not due to its fault or negligence.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any amendments to this agreement should be made in writing and signed by both the company and the hotel.
texts.text: Any amendments to this agreement should be made in writing and signed by both the company and the hotel.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel reserves the right at any time, by giving 30-days notice in writing, to cancel this agreement should the company fail to fulfil the above terms and conditions. Upon cancellation all sums outstanding from the company shall be immediately due and payable.
texts.text: The hotel reserves the right at any time, by giving 30-days notice in writing, to cancel this agreement should the company fail to fulfil the above terms and conditions. Upon cancellation all sums outstanding from the company shall be immediately due and payable.

texts.orig: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Kenya
texts.text: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Kenya

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This Agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties hereto and shall supersede any other representation, agreement, statement and understanding made prior to the execution thereof other than those expressly set forth with.
texts.text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties hereto and shall supersede any other representation, agreement, statement and understanding made prior to the execution thereof other than those expressly set forth with.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Amendments or additions to this Agreement shall be served in writing and shall be approved by the two parties.
texts.text: Amendments or additions to this Agreement shall be served in writing and shall be approved by the two parties.
